title: vicia americana var. americana
intro: Vicia americana var. americana, also known as American vetch, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of American vetch include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic. American vetch can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in topical applications to treat skin issues and wounds.
